---
title: "kuwait_diagnostic_delay"
format: html
---

```{r}
#load packages 
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

kuwait <- read.csv("kuwait_merged_final.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

kuwait <- kuwait %>%
  mutate(
    diagnostic_delay = age_at_diagnosis - age_at_onset
  )

cat("Diagnostic delay summary:\n")
summary(kuwait$diagnostic_delay)

cat("\nBy metaboliser phenotype:\n")
kuwait %>%
  group_by(Cyrius_phenotype) %>%
  summarise(
    n             = n(),
    mean_delay    = round(mean(diagnostic_delay, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    sd_delay      = round(sd(diagnostic_delay, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    median_delay  = round(median(diagnostic_delay, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
  )
```


```{r}
#diagnostic delay in yrs
kuwait %>%
  select(Sample, age_at_onset, age_at_diagnosis, diagnostic_delay) %>%
  print(n = 20)
```

```{r}
#diagnosic delay in months 

kuwait <- kuwait %>%
  mutate(
    diagnostic_delay_years  = age_at_diagnosis - age_at_onset,
    diagnostic_delay_months = diagnostic_delay_years * 12
  )

cat("Diagnostic delay in months:\n")
summary(kuwait$diagnostic_delay_months)

cat("\nBy metaboliser phenotype (months):\n")
kuwait %>%
  group_by(Cyrius_phenotype) %>%
  summarise(
    n              = n(),
    mean_delay     = round(mean(diagnostic_delay_months, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    sd_delay       = round(sd(diagnostic_delay_months, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    median_delay   = round(median(diagnostic_delay_months, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    min_delay      = min(diagnostic_delay_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_delay      = max(diagnostic_delay_months, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
# Remove unknown and missing
kuwait_plot <- kuwait %>%
  filter(Cyrius_phenotype != "unknown",
         !is.na(diagnostic_delay_months)) %>%
  mutate(
    Cyrius_phenotype = factor(Cyrius_phenotype, levels = c("NM", "IM", "PM", "UM")),
    case_id = row_number()
  )

ggplot(kuwait_plot, aes(x = diagnostic_delay_months, 
                         y = reorder(as.character(Sample), diagnostic_delay_months),
                         colour = Cyrius_phenotype)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = diagnostic_delay_months,
                   yend = reorder(as.character(Sample), diagnostic_delay_months)),
               linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey70") +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("NM" = "#2c3e50", "IM" = "#2980b9", "PM" = "#e74c3c", "UM" = "#27ae60"),
    name   = "Metaboliser\nphenotype"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 48, 12)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Diagnostic delay by CYP2D6 metaboliser phenotype",
    subtitle = "Kuwait cohort — ALS cases",
    x        = "Time to diagnosis (months)",
    y        = "ALS case"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.subtitle  = element_text(size = 10, colour = "grey40"),
    axis.text.y    = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.text.x    = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

ggsave("kuwait_diagnostic_delay.png", width = 9, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
# Column names
names(kuwait)

# First few rows + column types
glimpse(kuwait)
```
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Prepare data
kuwait_ecdf <- kuwait %>%
  filter(
    Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "IM"),  # excludes unknowns
    !is.na(diagnostic_delay_months)        # excludes missing delay (the NA on row 8)
  ) %>%
  mutate(Cyrius_phenotype = factor(Cyrius_phenotype, levels = c("NM", "IM")))

# Count n per group for labels
n_labels <- kuwait_ecdf %>%
  count(Cyrius_phenotype) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(Cyrius_phenotype, " (n=", n, ")"))

# Build reverse ECDF (proportion NOT YET diagnosed)
kuwait_ecdf <- kuwait_ecdf %>%
  group_by(Cyrius_phenotype) %>%
  arrange(diagnostic_delay_months) %>%
  mutate(
    rank = row_number(),
    n_group = n(),
    prop_undiagnosed = 1 - (rank / n_group)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Add time zero (proportion = 1 at delay = 0)
time_zero <- kuwait_ecdf %>%
  distinct(Cyrius_phenotype, n_group) %>%
  mutate(diagnostic_delay_months = 0,
         prop_undiagnosed = 1,
         rank = 0)

plot_data <- bind_rows(time_zero, kuwait_ecdf) %>%
  arrange(Cyrius_phenotype, diagnostic_delay_months)

# Plot
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = diagnostic_delay_months, y = prop_undiagnosed,
                      colour = Cyrius_phenotype)) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 0.9) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("NM" = "#2166AC", "IM" = "#D6604D"),
    labels = n_labels$label
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    name = "Diagnostic delay (months)",
    breaks = seq(0, 50, by = 12),
    limits = c(0, 50)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Proportion undiagnosed",
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Time to ALS diagnosis by CYP2D6 metaboliser phenotype",
    subtitle = "Kuwait cohort — descriptive only (n=18)",
    colour = "Metaboliser phenotype",
    caption = "Reverse ECDF. Two cases excluded: unknown CYP2D6 phenotype (n=1) and missing diagnostic delay (n=1)."
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "inside",
    legend.position.inside = c(0.85, 0.85),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 8, colour = "grey50", hjust = 0)
  )
```

```{r}

# Prepare data
kuwait_ecdf <- kuwait %>%
  filter(
    Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "IM"),
    !is.na(diagnostic_delay_months)
  ) %>%
  arrange(diagnostic_delay_months) %>%
  mutate(
    n_total = n(),
    rank = row_number(),
    prop_undiagnosed = 1 - (rank / n_total)
  )

# Add time zero and final drop
time_zero <- tibble(diagnostic_delay_months = 0, prop_undiagnosed = 1)
final_drop <- tibble(diagnostic_delay_months = 48, prop_undiagnosed = 0)

plot_data <- bind_rows(time_zero, kuwait_ecdf, final_drop)

# Plot
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = diagnostic_delay_months, y = prop_undiagnosed)) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 0.9, colour = "#2166AC") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    name = "Diagnostic delay (months)",
    breaks = seq(0, 48, by = 12),
    limits = c(0, 54)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Proportion undiagnosed",
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Time to ALS diagnosis",
    subtitle = "Kuwait cohort — descriptive only (n=18)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

ggsave("kuwait_ecdf_diagnostic_delay.png", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```

```{r}
library(patchwork)

# --- Shared data prep ---
kuwait_plot <- kuwait %>%
  filter(Cyrius_phenotype != "unknown",
         !is.na(diagnostic_delay_months)) %>%
  mutate(
    Cyrius_phenotype = factor(Cyrius_phenotype, levels = c("NM", "IM", "PM", "UM")),
    case_id = row_number()
  )

# --- Plot 1: Lollipop ---
p1 <- ggplot(kuwait_plot, aes(x = diagnostic_delay_months,
                               y = reorder(as.character(Sample), diagnostic_delay_months),
                               colour = Cyrius_phenotype)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = diagnostic_delay_months,
                   yend = reorder(as.character(Sample), diagnostic_delay_months)),
               linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey70") +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("NM" = "#2c3e50", "IM" = "#2980b9", "PM" = "#e74c3c", "UM" = "#27ae60"),
    name = "Metaboliser\nphenotype"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 48, 12)) +
  labs(
    title = "Diagnostic delay by CYP2D6 metaboliser phenotype",
    subtitle = "Kuwait cohort — ALS cases",
    x = "Time to diagnosis (months)",
    y = "ALS case"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, colour = "grey40"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

# --- Plot 2: ECDF ---
kuwait_ecdf <- kuwait_plot %>%
  arrange(diagnostic_delay_months) %>%
  mutate(
    n_total = n(),
    rank = row_number(),
    prop_undiagnosed = 1 - (rank / n_total)
  )

time_zero <- tibble(diagnostic_delay_months = 0, prop_undiagnosed = 1)
final_drop <- tibble(diagnostic_delay_months = c(48, 48), prop_undiagnosed = c(1/18, 0))
plot_data <- bind_rows(time_zero, kuwait_ecdf, final_drop)

p2 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = diagnostic_delay_months, y = prop_undiagnosed)) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 0.9, colour = "#2166AC") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    name = "Diagnostic delay (months)",
    breaks = seq(0, 48, by = 12),
    limits = c(0, 54)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Proportion undiagnosed",
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Time to ALS diagnosis",
    subtitle = "Kuwait cohort — descriptive only (n=18)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

# --- Combine and save ---
p1 + p2 + plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

ggsave("kuwait_diagnostic_delay_combined.png", width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
```


```{r}
```
